name: deep_ocean_bioluminescence
description: Colors from the twilight and midnight zones where life makes its own light

palette.name: abyss_black
palette.note: The baseline dark of water at 1000m depth

palette.name: anglerfish_blue
palette.note: Not recommended to visit in person

palette.name: lure_gold
palette.note: Anglerfish esca — nature's most dangerous lamp

palette.name: ghost_white
palette.note: Barreleye fish eyes, optimized for bioluminescent detection

fun_fact: The deep ocean is Earth's largest inhabited space by volume. Most of it has never been seen by humans.
